validation_results.test_output_summary: 30 passed, 9 deselected in 0.27s. All supersession tests passed including marking, count handling, forward declarations, cross-project operations, idempotency, chain tracing, and race resolution.
validation_results.code_quality: All files pass ruff lint checks. Implementation follows project patterns for layered architecture. Zero-LLM constraints verified.

criteria_verification.notes: Independent test test_write_successor_marks_predecessor_superseded_by passed. Implementation in apply_supersessions marks predecessors with superseded_by link.
Independent test test_superseded_record_excluded_from_default_retrieval passed. Superseded records have superseded_by field set for retrieval filtering.
Independent parametrized tests passed for counts 0, 1, and 5. apply_supersessions handles arbitrary predecessor counts correctly.
Independent test test_forward_supersession_succeeds passed. Forward supersession via _apply_forward_supersessions records link and applies when predecessor appears later.
Independent test test_cross_project_supersession passed. Natural key parsing enables cross-project predecessor retirement while successor remains in own namespace.
Independent test test_idempotent_redeclaration passed. Re-declaring same supersession updates superseded_by field with same value, creating no duplicate state.
Independent test test_chain_collapse_traceable passed. Chain A←B←C creates traceable superseded_by links from A through B to C.
Independent test test_racing_successors_resolve_to_one passed. Last-write-wins semantics ensure deterministic resolution to single successor with no contradictory state.
All modified files pass ruff lint checks. Evidence shows 'All checks passed!' for src/fleet_memory/writer/.

rationale: All nine acceptance criteria verified through independent test execution. 30 tests passed covering all supersession scenarios: basic marking, arbitrary predecessor counts (0/1/5), forward declarations, cross-project operations, idempotency, chain traceability, and race resolution. All quality gates passed. Honesty score 1.0 with zero discrepancies. Code quality verified via lint checks. No blocking guards triggered.
